task: Reconcile two conflicting medication sources while one external source is unavailable.
assertions: Patient and encounter context remain visible throughout the task.
Unavailable source data is not represented as no medication.
Medication name, strength, dose, route, frequency, units, source, and decision remain associated.
The result remains visibly unsigned until an authoritative signing response.
forbidden_outcomes: Conflicting medications are automatically merged without an attributable decision.
Continue and stop are distinguished only by color.
